member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs
member.summary: Contains context passed to before/after request hooks during the OAuth authentication flow.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs.Client
member.summary: Client instance.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs.Request
member.summary: Request instance.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs.Response
member.summary: Response instance.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs.Parameters
member.summary: Values received from service.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs.Configuration
member.summary: Client configuration.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Endpoint
member.summary: Defines endpoint URI (service address).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Endpoint.BaseUri
member.summary: Base URI (service host address).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Endpoint.Resource
member.summary: Resource URI (service method).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Endpoint.Uri
member.summary: Complete URI of endpoint (base URI combined with resource URI).

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.IClient
member.summary: Defines API for doing user authentication using certain third-party service.
member.remarks: Standard flow is: - client is used to generate login link () - hosting app renders page with generated login link - user clicks login link - this leads to redirect to third-party service site - user authenticates and allows app access their basic information - third-party service redirects user to hosting app - hosting app reads user information using method

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.IClient.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (third-party authentication service). Defined by client implementation developer and supposed to be unique.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.IClient.GetLoginLinkUriAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns URI of service which should be called in order to start authentication process. You should use this URI when rendering login link.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.IClient.State
member.summary: State which was posted as additional parameter to service and then received along with main answer.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.IClient.GetUserInfoAsync(System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Obtains user information using third-party authentication service using data provided via callback request.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.IClient.Configuration
member.summary: Client configuration object.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient
member.summary: Asana authentication client.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to third-party service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.AsanaClient.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth2 service).

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient
member.summary: DigitalOcean authentication client.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth2 service).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient.AfterGetAccessToken(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called after the access token is obtained. Stores the raw response for later user info parsing.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.DigitalOceanClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.FoursquareClient
member.summary: Foursquare authentication client.

remarks.para: Warning: Foursquare deprecated the v2 consumer API, including the /v2/users/self endpoint used by this client. New applications should use the Foursquare Places API (v3) with API keys.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.FoursquareClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.summary: Called just before issuing request to third-party service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The factory used to create HTTP requests.

member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.ParseEmailAddresses(System.String)
member.summary: Parses the email addresses from the GitHub user emails API response.
member.param: The JSON content returned from the user emails endpoint.
member.returns: A list of representing the user's email addresses.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth2 service).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.UserEmailServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain email addresses of user which is currently logged in.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.UserEmails
member.summary: Represents an email address returned by the GitHub user emails API.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.UserEmails.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the email address.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.UserEmails.Primary
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this is the user's primary email.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GitHubClient.UserEmails.Verified
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the email address has been verified.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.GoogleClient

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LinkedInClient
member.summary: LinkedIn authentication client using OpenID Connect (Sign In with LinkedIn v2).

remarks.para: Updated from deprecated v1 API (/uas/oauth2/, /v1/people/~ XML) to current v2 OAuth 2.0 with OpenID Connect (/oauth/v2/, /v2/userinfo JSON). Requires openid profile email scopes.

member.seealso: Sign In with LinkedIn using OpenID Connect

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LinkedInClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LinkedInClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LinkedInClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LinkedInClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LinkedInClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LinkedInClient.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth service).

member.summary: Obtains user information using provider API.

member.summary: Called just before issuing request to third-party service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.

member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth2 service).

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LoginCidadaoClient.Cidadao
member.summary: Represents a Login Cidadão user with additional Brazilian citizen information.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.LoginCidadaoClient.Cidadao.Cpf
member.summary: Gets or sets the CPF (Cadastro de Pessoas Físicas) number.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.MicrosoftClient
member.summary: Microsoft authentication client using Microsoft Identity Platform (v2.0) and Microsoft Graph.
member.remarks: This client uses the current Microsoft Identity Platform (login.microsoftonline.com) and Microsoft Graph API (graph.microsoft.com). It is the modern alternative to for new integrations, but is not a drop-in replacement — user IDs and supported scopes differ between the two platforms.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.MicrosoftClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.MicrosoftClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.MicrosoftClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.TodoistClient
member.summary: Todoist authentication client.

remarks.para: Updated from deprecated Sync API v6 to the current Todoist API v1 (unified). Uses GET /api/v1/user with Bearer token for user info instead of the old API/v6/sync endpoint.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.TodoistClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth2 service).

member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient
member.summary: VK (Vkontakte) authentication client.

remarks.para: Updated to VK API v5.131 (previous v5.74 was deprecated). See issue #146.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient.AfterGetAccessToken(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just after obtaining response with access token from third-party service. Allows to read extra data returned along with access token.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to third-party service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VkClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VSTSClient
member.summary: Visual Studio Team Services (VSTS) / Azure DevOps authentication client.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VSTSClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VSTSClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VSTSClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VSTSClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VSTSClient.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to third-party service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.VSTSClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service. For more information see https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/azure/devops/profile/profiles/get
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.WindowsLiveClient
member.summary: Windows Live authentication client.

remarks.para: This client uses the legacy Windows Live / Live Connect endpoints (login.live.com and apis.live.net/v5.0). Although Microsoft officially retired the Live SDK in November 2018, these endpoints continue to function in practice and are actively used in production (e.g. Exceptionless with wl.emails scope).
For new integrations, consider using instead, which targets the Microsoft Identity Platform (v2.0) and Microsoft Graph API. Note that user IDs differ between the two platforms.

member.seealso: Migrating from Live SDK to Microsoft Graph

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.WindowsLiveClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.WindowsLiveClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.WindowsLiveClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.WindowsLiveClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.WindowsLiveClient.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to third-party service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.WindowsLiveClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient
member.summary: X (formerly Twitter) authentication client using OAuth 1.0a.

remarks.para: X (formerly Twitter) uses OAuth 1.0a for authentication. The API endpoints at api.twitter.com are still operational but require at minimum Basic API access tier ($100/month) for read endpoints. The free tier only supports posting.
Requests user email via include_email=true parameter. Requires the "Request email address from users" permission enabled in the X Developer Portal app settings.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.RequestTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which is called for obtaining request token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.LoginServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which should be called to initiate authentication process.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which is called to obtain user information.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth service).

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to service when everything is ready. Adds include_email=true to request the user's email address.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.XClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed using content of callback issued by service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient
member.summary: Yahoo authentication client.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.UserProfileGUID
member.summary: Gets the Yahoo user profile GUID obtained from the token response.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.Name
member.summary: Yahoo client name

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: The access code service endpoint

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: The acess token service endpoint

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.AfterGetAccessToken(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: It's required to store the User GUID obtained in the response for further usage https://developer.yahoo.com/oauth2/guide/flows_authcode/

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary:
Called just before issuing request to third-party service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.
We have to reformat the Url adding the user guid for accessing their information https://developer.yahoo.com/oauth2/guide/apirequests/

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user which is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.Impl.YahooClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed from content received from third-party service.
member.param: The content which is received from third-party service.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client
member.summary: Base class for OAuth2 client implementation.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.Configuration
member.summary: Client configuration object.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth2 service).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.State
member.summary: State (any additional information that was provided by application and is posted back by service).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.AccessToken
member.summary: Access token returned by provider. Can be used for further calls of provider API.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.RefreshToken
member.summary: Refresh token returned by provider. Can be used for further calls of provider API.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.TokenType
member.summary: Token type returned by provider. Can be used for further calls of provider API.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.ExpiresAt
member.summary: Seconds till the token expires returned by provider. Can be used for further calls of provider API.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.GetLoginLinkUriAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns URI of service which should be called in order to start authentication process. This URI should be used for rendering login link.
member.param: Any additional information that will be posted back by service.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.GetTokenAsync(System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues query for access token and returns access token.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.GetCurrentTokenAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a valid access token, refreshing it if expired or forced.
member.param: Optional refresh token to use. Falls back to the stored refresh token.
When true, forces a token refresh even if the current token has not expired.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.AccessCodeServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access code.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which allows to obtain information about user who is currently logged in.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.QueryAccessTokenAsync(System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues query for access token and parses response.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.ParseTokenResponse(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Parses a value from the access token response by key, supporting both JSON and query-string formats.
member.param: The key to look up in the response.
member.returns: The value associated with , or null if not found.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed using content received from provider.
member.param: The content which is received from provider.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.BeforeGetAccessToken(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to obtain access token. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.
member.param: Request context containing client, request, parameters, and configuration.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.AfterGetAccessToken(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just after obtaining response with access token from service. Allows to read extra data returned along with access token.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuth2Client.GetUserInfoAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Obtains user information using provider API.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient
member.summary: Base class for OAuth (version 1) client implementation.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.Configuration
member.summary: Client configuration object.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.Name
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (OAuth service).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.State
member.summary: State which was posted as additional parameter to service and then received along with main answer.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.AccessToken
member.summary: Access token received from service. Can be used for further service API calls.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.AccessTokenSecret
member.summary: Access token secret received from service. Can be used for further service API calls.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.#ctor(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Configuration.IClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.GetLoginLinkUriAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns URI of service which should be called in order to start authentication process. You should use this URI when rendering login link.
member.param: Any additional information needed by application.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.RequestTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which is called for obtaining request token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.LoginServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which should be called to initiate authentication process.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.AccessTokenServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which issues access token.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.UserInfoServiceEndpoint
member.summary: Defines URI of service which is called to obtain user information.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.ParseUserInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Should return parsed using content of callback issued by service.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.QueryRequestTokenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Issues request for request token and returns result.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.GetLoginRequestUri(System.String)
member.summary: Composes login link URI.
member.param: Any additional information needed by application.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.QueryAccessTokenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Obtains access token by calling corresponding service.
member.param: Verifier posted with callback issued by provider.
member.returns: Access token and other extra info.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.BeforeGetAccessToken(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to obtain access token. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.
member.param: Request context containing client, request, and configuration.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.AfterGetAccessToken(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just after obtaining response with access token from service. Allows to read extra data returned along with access token.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.BeforeGetUserInfo(OAuth2.Client.BeforeAfterRequestArgs)
member.summary: Called just before issuing request to service when everything is ready. Allows to add extra parameters to request or do any other needed preparations.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.OAuthClient.QueryUserInfoAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Queries user info using corresponding service and data received by access token request.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException
member.summary: Indicates unexpected response from service.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException.FieldName
member.summary: Name of field which contains unexpected (GET) response.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException.ErrorCode
member.summary: OAuth error code returned by the provider (e.g. "access_denied", "invalid_request"). Populated when the error originates from an OAuth callback per RFC 6749 §4.1.2.1.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException.ErrorDescription
member.summary: Human-readable error description returned by the provider. Populated when the error originates from an OAuth callback per RFC 6749 §4.1.2.1.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException.Response
member.summary: Unexpected response itself (can be null, if error occurred later in the response processing pipeline).

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException.#ctor(RestSharp.RestResponse)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Client.UnexpectedResponseException.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with OAuth error details from the provider callback.
member.param: Human-readable error description from the provider.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration
member.summary: Runtime client configuration. Use instead of when you need manually create client configuration in runtime.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration.ClientTypeName
member.summary: Name of client type.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration.IsEnabled
member.summary: Client state: enabled or disabled.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration.ClientId
member.summary: Client ID (ID of your application).

member.name: P:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration.ClientSecret
member.summary: Client secret.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration.ClientPublic
member.summary: Public key.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration.Scope
member.summary: Scope - contains set of permissions which user should give to your application.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Configuration.ClientConfiguration.RedirectUri
member.summary: Redirect URI (URI user will be redirected to after authentication using third-party service).

member.summary: Name of client type.

member.summary: Client state: enabled or disabled.

member.summary: Client ID (ID of your application).

member.summary: Client secret.

member.summary: Scope - contains set of permissions which user should give to your application.

member.summary: Redirect URI (URI user will be redirected to after authentication using third-party service).

member.summary: OAuth2 library configuration.

member.summary: Returns settings for service client with given name.

member.summary: Extension methods for to simplify JSON navigation and value extraction.

member.summary: Converts a of any type to its string representation.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Extensions.SerializerExtensions.GetStringOrDefault(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a string value from a named property, returning null if the property does not exist or is null.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Extensions.SerializerExtensions.SelectToken(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String)
member.summary: Navigates a dot-separated path with optional array indexing (e.g. "images[0].url"). Returns null if any segment is missing.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Extensions.SerializerExtensions.TryGetPropertyIgnoreCase(System.Text.Json.JsonElement,System.String,System.Text.Json.JsonElement@)
member.summary: Tries to get a property by name using case-insensitive comparison.

member.summary: Extension methods for .

member.summary: Allows processing of each item using arbitrary action.

member.summary: Intended for REST client/request creation.

member.summary: Returns new REST client instance with the specified base URL.

member.summary: Returns new REST request instance.

member.summary: Returns new REST request instance with the specified HTTP method.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Infrastructure.NameValueCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for .

member.name: M:OAuth2.Infrastructure.NameValueCollectionExtensions.GetOrThrowUnexpectedResponse(System.Collections.Specialized.NameValueCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the value associated with the specified key, or throws an if the value is empty.
member.param: The key whose value to retrieve.
member.returns: The non-empty value associated with the specified key.
member.exception: Thrown when the value for is null or empty.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Infrastructure.ObjectExtensions
member.summary: Common extensions.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Infrastructure.ObjectExtensions.AllPropertiesAreEqualTo(System.Object,System.Object)
member.summary: Returns true if all equally named and typed properties have same values on two different objects (types of objects can be different).

member.summary: Default implementation of .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with transport options.
member.param: Transport-level options applied to every client created by this factory.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RequestFactory.CreateClient(System.String)
member.summary: Returns new REST client instance with the specified base URL.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RequestFactory.CreateRequest(System.String)
member.summary: Returns new REST request instance.

member.summary: Provides convenience extension methods for using instances.

member.summary: Creates a configured with the base URI of the specified endpoint.
member.param: The endpoint whose base URI is used.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RequestFactoryExtensions.CreateRequest(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Client.Endpoint)
member.summary: Creates a for the specified endpoint using .
member.param: The endpoint whose resource path is used.
member.returns: A configured for a GET request.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RequestFactoryExtensions.CreateRequest(OAuth2.Infrastructure.IRequestFactory,OAuth2.Client.Endpoint,RestSharp.Method)
member.summary: Creates a for the specified endpoint using the given HTTP method.
member.param: The endpoint whose resource path is used.
The HTTP method for the request.
member.returns: A configured with the specified method.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RequestOptions
member.summary: Transport-level options for HTTP requests made by OAuth clients.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RequestOptions.Timeout
member.summary: Maximum time to wait for a response. When null, the HTTP client default is used.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RestClientExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for with response verification.

member.name: M:OAuth2.Infrastructure.RestClientExtensions.ExecuteAndVerifyAsync(RestSharp.RestClient,RestSharp.RestRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the request and verifies that the response has content and a success status code.
member.param: A token to cancel the operation.
member.exception: Thrown when the response is empty or has a non-success status code.

member.summary: Executes selector on instance and returns result or returns default value of target type if given instance is null.

member.summary: Executes selector on instance and returns result or returns default value of target type if given instance is null.

member.summary: Returns MD5 Hash of input.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Models.AvatarInfo
member.summary: Contains URIs for different sizes of a user's avatar image.

member.summary: Image size constants.

member.summary: Uri of small photo.

member.summary: Uri of normal photo.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Models.AvatarInfo.Large
member.summary: Uri of large photo.

member.name: T:OAuth2.Models.UserInfo
member.summary: Contains information about user who is being authenticated.

member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Models.UserInfo.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Models.UserInfo.ProviderName
member.summary: Friendly name of provider (which is, in its turn, the client of OAuth/OAuth2 provider).
member.remarks: Supposed to be unique per OAuth/OAuth2 client.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Models.UserInfo.Email
member.summary: Email address.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Models.UserInfo.FirstName
member.summary: First name.

member.summary: Last name.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Models.UserInfo.PhotoUri
member.summary: Photo URI.

member.name: P:OAuth2.Models.UserInfo.AvatarUri
member.summary: Contains URIs of different sizes of avatar.
